Private Yacht

Uluwatu

Sail toward Uluwatu's iconic sea temple, discover hidden surf spots, and end with a magical sunset viewing experience. This route combines cultural significance with natural beauty.

Book This Route

Uluwatu Sunset & Temple

Dramatic clifftop temples, surf breaks, and the best sunset views in southern Bali.

Price
From Rp14.500.000
Duration
5-6 Hours
Ideal for
Sunset lovers, photographers, surfers
Transport
Private Yacht

04

Designed for the private journey and your Bali celebration.

05
